title: The SME IPO Market in 2026: Stricter Entry, Smarter Execution
description: In this 'Leading Questions' piece, Richa Bhansali discusses SEBI's evolving regulatory approach toward SME IPOs, the tightening of eligibility norms, and the practical realities of navigating public markets in a volatile environment.Question: The SME IPO segment has seen tremendous activity over the past few years, but the regulatory environment has also shifted significantly. How would you characterise where things stand today?Answer: The SME IPO market has matured considerably, but not without
